name.title: Name
name.description: A unique name for this OAuth2/OIDC platform instance.

providers.title: Identity Providers
providers.description: Configure one or more OAuth2 / OIDC identity providers.

id.title: Provider ID
id.description: A unique identifier for this provider (used by other plugins to reference it).

displayName.title: Display Name
displayName.description: A human-readable name for this provider.

discoveryUrl.title: OIDC Discovery URL
discoveryUrl.description: The OpenID Connect discovery URL (e.g. https://id.lan/.well-known/openid-configuration). Endpoints are resolved automatically.

scopes.title: Scopes
scopes.description: Default scopes to request (space-separated). Defaults to 'openid profile email'.

pkce.title: Use PKCE
pkce.description: Use PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) for the authorization code flow.

tlsRejectUnauthorized.title: Skip TLS Verification
tlsRejectUnauthorized.description: Skip TLS certificate validation (use for self-signed/internal certificates, e.g. .lan domains).

allowedGroups.title: Allowed Groups
allowedGroups.description: Restrict access to users belonging to at least one of these OIDC groups. Leave empty to allow all users.

groupsClaim.title: Groups Claim
groupsClaim.description: The OIDC claim that contains group memberships (default: 'groups').
